name: Low-Carb Chicken Crust Pizza
description: A pizza with a crust made entirely from seasoned ground chicken. Topped with tomato sauce, vegetables, and mozzarella for a guilt-free dinner.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine ground chicken, mozzarella, egg, parsley, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Press the mixture out into a thin, flat round crust on the parchment (about 6mm thick).
Bake the crust for 20 minutes until firm and lightly golden.
Spread tomato sauce over the crust, then add sliced onion, bell pepper, mushrooms, olives, and top with mozzarella.
Return to oven for 8–10 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Slice into portions and store in airtight containers for up to 4 days.
notes: Store in airtight containers for up to 4 days. Reheat in oven at 180°C for best results.
